evt_021.label: Drop
evt_021.basis: Party D exited the process without any filing language tying its withdrawal to market price or to a prior informal bid.
evt_021.source_text: Also on October 8, 2014, Deutsche Bank met with representatives from Party D, who indicated that it did not intend to move forward with discussions regarding a potential transaction involving the Company.

initiation_judgment.basis: Penford's process moved forward after the board focused on both SEACOR's activist 13D activity and Ingredion's acquisition approach.
initiation_judgment.source_text: Therefore, on July 22, 2014, Mr. Lawlor, as secretary of the Company, provided notice of a meeting of the Executive Committee of the Penford board for the purpose of discussing, among other things, recent Schedule 13D filings, including the SEACOR Filing and strategic developments, including the discussions with Ingredion.

advisor_deutsche_bank.source_text: Following discussion of potential financial advisors, the Executive Committee directed management to proceed to retain Deutsche Bank as the Company's financial advisor and to advise on shareholder matters and to evaluate strategic alternatives.

advisor_perkins_coie.source_text: representatives of Perkins Coie LLP (referred to as Perkins Coie), Penford's legal counsel, were present.

advisor_jp_morgan.source_text: representatives of J. P. Morgan Securities, Ingredion's financial advisor.

advisor_sidley_austin.source_text: Sidley Austin LLP (referred to as Sidley Austin), Ingredion's legal counsel.

advisor_milbank.source_text: Milbank, Tweed, Hadley & McCloy, LLP (referred to as Milbank), legal counsel to SEACOR

count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly; the grouped actor for the two unnamed prior industry parties preserves both counterparties.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 6 potential strategic counterparties contacted in the market check
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly; Parties A through F are the six extracted market-check counterparties.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 2 counterparties that declined to enter into nondisclosure agreements
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly; Party B and Party F are the two extracted counterparties that did not move into executed NDA events.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 1 counterparty that never returned Deutsche Bank outreach
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly; Party E is the single extracted counterparty that never responded to Deutsche Bank's outreach.
